rationale: The potential US-Iran deal and ongoing Lebanon strikes remain the most relevant development for Poland via energy price implications, but no qualitative breakthrough has occurred yet.

top_events.title: US-Iran deal reported near; Israel strikes Lebanon continue
top_events.summary: A potential US-Iran agreement could ease energy market tensions affecting Polish gas and electricity prices, but deal is still unconfirmed and 'lots can go wrong'. Continuation of prior cycle's baseline.

top_events.title: Anthropic suspends AI tools for foreign nationals on US government order
top_events.summary: US restricts access to Anthropic AI for non-US users, a minor but notable signal of tech decoupling that could affect Polish businesses and researchers using US AI services.

top_events.title: Switzerland votes on capping population at 10 million
top_events.summary: Swiss referendum on population cap could signal broader European anti-migration sentiment, with indirect relevance to EU migration policy debates affecting Poland.
